User.title: User
User.description: Represents a user of the AgroVision AI platform.

fullName.description: The full name of the user.

email.description: The email address of the user.

preferredLanguage.description: The user's preferred language for the application.

profileImageURL.description: URL of the user's profile image.

PlantDiseaseDetection.title: PlantDiseaseDetection
PlantDiseaseDetection.description: Represents a single plant disease detection record.

id.description: Unique identifier for the detection record.

imageURL.description: URL of the uploaded plant image.

diseaseName.description: The name of the detected disease.

confidenceLevel.description: The confidence level of the AI detection (0-1).

treatmentOrganic.description: Recommended organic treatment for the disease.

treatmentChemical.description: Recommended chemical treatment for the disease.

detectionDate.description: The date and time when the detection was performed.

DailyFarmingTip.title: DailyFarmingTip
DailyFarmingTip.description: Represents a daily farming tip for a user.

id.description: Unique identifier for the daily farming tip.

tipText.description: The text content of the daily farming tip.

tipDate.description: The date for which the farming tip is valid.

definition.description: Stores user profiles.  Path-based ownership ensures only the user can access their own profile.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier for the user.

definition.description: Stores plant disease detection records for each user. Path-based ownership enables secure listing of detection records for a specific user.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier for the user.

params.name: detectionId
params.description: The unique identifier for the plant disease detection record.

definition.description: Stores daily farming tips for each user. Path-based ownership ensures that only the user can access their own tips.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier for the user.

params.name: tipId
params.description: The unique identifier for the daily farming tip.

firestore.reasoning: The Firestore structure is designed to provide a secure, scalable, and easily debuggable backend for the AgroVision AI application. It prioritizes authorization independence by denormalizing user IDs into subcollections to avoid `get()` calls in security rules. This supports atomic operations and simplifies debugging. Structural segregation ensures that collections contain documents with homogeneous security needs. Access modeling utilizes path-based ownership for user-owned data (plant disease detections and daily farming tips) to simplify security rules and improve efficiency. The structure supports the required QAPs by using segregation (separate collections for different data types) and path-based ownership to enable secure list operations.  The structure stores user profiles separately in `/users/{userId}`.  Plant disease detections and daily farming tips are stored under the respective user's document for easy retrieval and secure data access, enabling the application to read these records efficiently and securely. This structure is essential to guarantee Authorization Independence (as is requested explicitly in the prompt).
